params.name: Superstring Computer
params.description:
On an unspecified date in the year 2248, Russian scientist Brekhov invented the first Superstring Computer.
The Superstring Computer is a theoretical type of future computer based on the principles of string theory. It attempts to utilize the vibrational modes of tiny strings to process and transmit information, enabling efficient computing capabilities similar to quantum computers. With the initial conditions of each particle provided, the entire universe would unfold like a mirror, displayi …
